headline: CenterWell Pharmacy® and Mark Cuban Cost Plus Drug Company Teaming up to Develop Disruptive Medication Model
summary: LOUISVILLE, Ky. & DALLAS, April 27, 2026--CenterWell Pharmacy®, a leader in specialty pharmacy and home delivery pharmacy and part of Humana Inc. (NYSE:HUM), today announced a deepened partnership with Mark Cuban Cost Plus Drug Company (Cost Plus Drugs) to develop new, end-to-end employer prescription solutions.

headline: Humana partners with Mark Cuban's Cost Plus Drugs on technology, distribution
summary: Humana announcedon Monday it will launch a pharmacy partnership with MarkCuban's Cost Plus Drugs, with the health conglomerate'sCenterWell pharmacy unit serving as a distributor for theplatform. ...
